items.caption: A digital illustration representing the concept of cloud computing storage. at the center, there is a large blue cloud with the words "cloud storage" written in white. from this central cloud, three lines extend to the bottom, each connecting to a different device: a smartphone, a laptop, and a desktop computer. each device has a symbol on its screen: a speech bubble on the smartphone, a document icon on the laptop, and a bar graph on the desktop. the devices are depicted in a simplified, flat design style. the background is white, emphasizing the devices and the cloud.
